body:
This bumps the `CloudMicrophysics.jl` version to allow merging P3 example in KID.

I also deleted the `NEWS.md`. We weren't very good at updating it and whatever was there, was basically repeated automatically by Github when doing a release. Lets just make sure that our PR and commit descriptions are informative. I think this repo is small enough that we can get away with it.
title: Bump version for a new release, delete NEWS.md
